description:
## File
src/utils.cr lines ~139-141

## Problem
UrlNormalizer.normalize strips all query parameters, causing feeds with same base URL but different query params to collide. This appears intentional for deduplication but is undocumented.

## Fix
Add a comment documenting this as intentional deduplication behavior. Optionally add a configurable allowlist of query parameters to preserve.
title: Document URL normalizer query string stripping behavior
